revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Case_templates_table here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Shortcut ! scope="col" style="width: 35%;" | Purpose ! scope="col" | Example ! scope="col" | Output ! scope="col" | Copy-pastes as |- | {{tl|Smallcaps}} | {{tl|sc1}}
{{tl|SC}} | No conversion, small-caps display, mixed case.
No font size change (acronyms are unaffected).
Common mixed-case heading style (not in Wikipedia).
Uses: Rendering publication titles in citation styles that require them in small-caps. | {{sc1|UNICEF}} and 312 {{sc1|BCE}}
{{tlc|sc1|Mixed Case}} | {{sc1|UNICEF}} and 312 {{sc1|BCE}}
{{sc1|Mixed Case}} | UNICEF and 312 BCE
Mixed Case |- | {{tl|Smallcaps2}} | {{tl|sc2}} | No conversion, small-caps display, mixed case.
Slightly reduced font size.
This is the conventional display of smallcaps for acronyms/initialisms in modern book typography.
Other uses: Unicode character names. | {{sc2|UNICEF}} and 312 {{sc2|BCE}}
{{tlc|sc2|Mixed Case}} | {{sc2|UNICEF}} and 312 {{sc2|BCE}}
{{sc2|Mixed Case}} | UNICEF and 312 BCE
Mixed Case |- | {{tl|Smallcaps all}} | {{tl|sc}} | '''{{smallcaps2|[[:en:Deprecated|{{red|Deprecated}}]]}}'''
Lowercase conversion, small-caps display, all uppercase.
The size of lowercase letters.
Uses: Stressed syllables (in {{tl|Respell}}); and ???.
{{error|Warning}}: Default use will permanently change {{xtn|UPPER-}} or {{xtn|Mixed-Case}} data,
does not work consistently across different browsers,
and is not compatible with named HTML character entities. | {{sc|UNICEF}} and 312 {{sc|BCE}}
{{tlc|sc|Mixed Case}} | {{sc|UNICEF}} and 312 {{sc|BCE}}
{{sc|Mixed Case}} | unicef and 312 bce
mixed case
(in many browsers) |- | {{tl|Allcaps}} | {{tl|caps}} | No conversion, all-caps display.
The size of uppercase letters.
Uses: ???. | {{caps|UNICEF}} and 312 {{caps|BCE}}
{{tlc|caps|Mixed Case}} | {{caps|UNICEF}} and 312 {{caps|BCE}}
{{caps|Mixed Case}} | UNICEF and 312 BCE
Mixed Case |- | {{tl|Nocaps}} |   | No conversion, all-lowercase display.
The size of lowercase letters.
Uses: ???. | {{nocaps|UNICEF}} and 312 {{nocaps|BCE}}
{{tlc|nocaps|Mixed Case}} | {{nocaps|UNICEF}} and 312 {{nocaps|BCE}}
{{nocaps|Mixed Case}} | UNICEF and 312 BCE
Mixed Case |} {{Documentation|content= This table is transcluded into the documentation of the various templates it illustrates. [[Category:Text-specific formatting and function templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
